intro: A curated set of 3 Greedy problems frequently useful for Bloomberg interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Greedy problems should I do for Bloomberg?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 3 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Greedy topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best Greedy Questions for Bloomberg | AlgoForge
seo.description: Top Greedy coding interview questions for Bloomberg. Practice list, FAQs, and pattern links.
